data.title: DBM Global Inc. to pay cash dividend of $5 million, $1.30 per share on Feb 24, 2026 to stockholders of record by Feb 9.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, DBM Global Inc. stated that it will distribute a cash dividend of around $5 million, equating to $1.30 per share, on February 24, 2026. This dividend will be provided to DBM Global Inc.'s shareholders of record as of the closing of business on February 9, 2026. DBM Global Inc. is a group of firms that offers fully integrated steel construction services and is a subsidiary of INNOVATE Corp. publicly traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol VATE.

data.title: Crescent Biopharma granted 117,339 shares to five non-executive employees as inducement awards.
data.description: In WALTHAM, Mass., on January 30, 2026, Crescent Biopharma, Inc. announced the approval by its Compensation Committee of the grant of options to purchase 117,339 shares of the Company’s ordinary shares. These options were provided as equity inducement awards to five non-executive employees under the Inducement Plan. The approval was granted on January 29, 2026, and each employee's acceptance of employment with Crescent was contingent on these options as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Crescent is a Nasdaq-listed clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on advancing cancer therapies.

data.title: Taitron Components Inc. (OTCID:TAIT) announces $0.035 quarterly dividend per share, totalling $0.14 per share annually.
data.description: Taitron Components Incorporated (OTCID:TAIT) revealed today that their Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.035 per share of common stock. Stockholders of record as of February 13, 2026, will receive this dividend on February 27, 2026. The Company aims to provide an annual cash dividend of $0.14 per share, given out in $0.035 increments on a quarterly basis as per their existing dividend policy.

data.title: OneStream (NASDAQ: OS) to announce Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results on Jan 30. A platform for CFOs.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, headquartered in Birmingham, Michigan, OneStream, Inc. (NASDAQ: OS) announced its position as the top enterprise Finance management platform. Through integrating core finance and operational tasks like financial close, consolidation, reporting, and planning, OneStream revolutionizes the Office of the CFO.

data.title: President Thomas P. Tulaney retires from Peoples Financial Services Corp. (NASDAQ: PFIS).
data.description: A bank holding company, Peoples Financial Services Corp. (PFIS) disclosed in a press release dated January 30, 2026, that Thomas P. Tulaney has communicated his retirement from the company. PFIS operates as the holding firm for Peoples Security Bank and Trust Company and is listed on the NASDAQ exchange under the ticker symbol PFIS. The announcement signals a significant change in leadership within the organization.

data.title: Peoples Financial Services Corp. (NASDAQ: PFIS) increases Q1 2026 dividend to $0.6250 per share from previous quarter.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, in Scranton, Pennsylvania, Peoples Financial Services Corp. ("Peoples") (NASDAQ: PFIS) announced a first quarter cash dividend of $0.6250 per share. This marks a 1.2% rise from the last quarter's dividend.

data.title: Planet Green Holdings Corp. addresses unusual market activity on Jan. 30, 2026; trading of common stock disrupted. NYSE American: PLAG.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, Planet Green Holdings Corp. (NYSE American: PLAG) disclosed detecting abnormal trading behavior in its common stock on the NYSE. The Company has noted this unusual activity and is actively monitoring the situation.

data.title: Achieve Life Sciences Inc. granted stock options for 115,000 shares to 5 new employees on Jan 28, 2026 under Equity Inducement Plan.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, Achieve Life Sciences, Inc., a specialty pharmaceutical company based in Seattle and Vancouver, British Columbia, revealed that they granted stock options to five new employees under their 2024 Equity Inducement Plan. The board of directors approved the grants on January 28, 2026, enabling the purchase of a total of 115,000 shares of Achieve's common stock. Achieve focuses on the global advancement and commercialization of cytisinicline to address nicotine dependence. These options mark a step towards bolstering the company's team and expanding its reach in the pharmaceutical sector.

data.title: Postal Realty Trust increases dividend for the eighth consecutive year and provides tax details on 2025 dividends.
data.description: Announces the eighth consecutive year of dividend increase. Also discloses tax characteristics of dividends for 2025.

data.title: CCC Intelligent Solutions Inc. names Josh Valdez as Chief Product Officer to boost AI-driven innovation, target P&C insurance sector.
data.description: Chicago-based CCC Intelligent Solutions Inc. (CCC), a prominent cloud platform provider for the P&C insurance industry, has named Josh Valdez as its new Chief Product Officer. In this role, Valdez will oversee CCC's product strategy, design, and implementation, focusing on expanding AI technology and innovation throughout the company's platform to enhance customer benefits. Valdez brings a wealth of experience as a product developer, emphasizing his expertise in developing and scaling technologies.

data.title: BMO to increase financing spread for MicroSectorsTM Gold Miners 3X Leveraged ETNs (NYSE Arca: GDXU) due June 29, 2040.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, in New York, the Bank of Montreal (BMO) revealed that under the provisions of the MicroSectorsTM Gold Miners 3X Leveraged Exchange Traded Notes lasting until June 29, 2040, BMO Capital Markets Corp., as the Calculation Agent for the ETNs, has chosen to...

data.title: ICZOOM Group Inc. (Nasdaq: IZM) reschedules extraordinary general meeting of shareholders.
data.description: Hong Kong, 30th January 2026 - ICZOOM Group Inc. (Nasdaq: IZM), a leading B2B e-commerce platform for electronic component products, revealed that its board of directors authorized a modification to the timetable for the Company's forthcoming extraordinary general meeting of shareholders (EGM).

data.title: Watsco to discuss 2025 Q4 and annual results on Feb 17, 2026 at 10:00am ET via webcast, earnings released before market opens.
data.description: Watsco, Inc. (NYSE: WSO) has announced its plans for a conference call to discuss the company's performance in the fourth quarter of 2025 and its annual results. The conference call is scheduled for Tuesday, February 17, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. (ET), with prepared remarks followed by a Q&A session with senior management. The call will be webcast by CCBN's StreetEvents, accessible through a link on Watsco's website at www.watsco.com. Earnings results will be disclosed before the market opens on February 17, 2026. Additionally, a replay of the conference call will be made available on the company's website for those unable to attend.

data.title: Test your financial savvy with our quiz on credit cards, home buying, saving for college or retirement, and more!
data.description: Challenge yourself with questions about credit cards, homebuying, college savings, retirement planning, and more that impact your finances. Test your knowledge on various financial topics to enhance your understanding and make informed decisions.

data.title: Aduro CT raises US$3M from over-allotment option to support plant, R&D after US public offering.
data.description: Aduro has successfully concluded the underwriter's over-allotment, resulting in the acquisition of US $3 million. This funding will be directed towards bolstering the Demonstration-Scale Plant, research and development efforts, as well as augmenting working capital following a public offering in the United States.

data.title: Olema Oncology's CFO Shane Kovacs is leaving the company on Jan. 30, 2026 to pursue new opportunities, remaining as a consultant until August 1, 2026. Nasdaq: OLMA.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, Olema Pharmaceuticals, Inc. ("Olema" or "Olema Oncology"), listed as Nasdaq: OLMA, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in targeted therapies for breast cancer, disclosed the departure of Shane Kovacs, Chief Operating and Financial Officer. Mr. Kovacs will be stepping down from his position on the mentioned date to explore other ventures. He has agreed to stay on as a consultant for Olema until August 1, 2026.

data.title: Kelly Services signs agreement with Hunt Equity Opportunities, includes new board appointments. Deal involves governance updates.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, in Troy, Michigan, Kelly Services, Inc. revealed a significant development. The company, listed as KELYA and KELYB on Nasdaq, specializing in talent solutions, shared that they have signed a letter of agreement with Hunt Equity Opportunities, LLC, a subsidiary of Hunt Companies, Inc. This agreement entails the modification and termination of the existing stockholder rights plan and includes specific commitments regarding Kelly's governance and assessment procedures for transactions. This strategic move showcases Kelly's commitment to enhancing its operational structure and fostering transparent governance.

data.title: Capital Southwest disclosed U.S. federal income tax treatment of 2025 dividends on Jan. 30, 2026. ($CSWC)
data.description: Dallas-based Capital Southwest Corporation (Nasdaq: CSWC), a business development company, recently disclosed the U.S. federal income tax status of its 2025 dividends. Specializing in offering adaptable financing options for middle market companies to facilitate their expansion and acquisitions, Capital Southwest provided this announcement on January 30, 2026.

data.title: Rice University named Official Houston World Cup 2026 Host City Supporter, key player in event planning.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, Rice University was designated as an Official Houston World Cup 2026 Host City Supporter. This recognition positions the state's prominent higher education institution at the forefront of arrangements for the upcoming global sporting extravaganza. The designation highlights Rice University's role in promoting the prestigious event and aligns with its commitment to...
